summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the artifact does not hydrate review/comment bodies needed for close or merge gates. Hydrated PRs are kept independently for maintainer/backlog review; refs missing from the preflight artifact are scoped needs_human for live-state hydration.
